strongest_improvements: console-error-workflow: 0% → 80% (without skill, agent can't use Chrome extension at all)
no-generic-fonts: baseline uses Inter, skill version avoids it
reduced-motion: baseline skips it, skill version always includes it
suggests-browser-setup: only with-skill recommends Chrome/Playwright setup
non_discriminating_assertions: dark-theme-not-pure-black: both versions pass (Claude naturally avoids pure black when asked for dark theme)
editorial-direction: both versions pass (prompt is specific enough to guide this)
